title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides families with the opportunity to build and purchase their own homes. Homes are sold to qualified families using below-market-rate financing. Participating families contribute volunteer hours and engage in the community as part of the program. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Households currently living in substandard housing that meet all of the following requirements: -Live or work in Bend or Redmond for at least 1 year -Meet income guidelines listed on website -Commit to community engagement and volunteering -Primary applicant is a United States citizen or permanent resident -Have not owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to make a mortgage payment (steady income) -Have a minimum credit score of 620 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 385-5387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 385-5387 Administration (541) 368-7628 DeeDee Johnson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. The process of applying to owning a home takes approximately 12-18 months, depending on the mortgage-readiness of each applicant. FEES: Households are responsible for a closing fee of up to $4,000, a 0% down payment toward closing costs, and a below-market-interest mortgage (low APR). Mortgage lengths vary depending on income. Habitat adjusts the monthly mortgage payment to include taxes, insurance, and HOA fees, if applicable, so that payments are no more than 33% of the homeowner’s gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Bend and Redmond TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of North 3rd Street and Thurston Avenue, across the street from Wagner Mall Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RESTORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
